title: thelypteris larutensis
intro: Thelypteris larutensis, also known as Larut fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and supporting immune function. Thelypteris larutensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
